stageHeartbeatSegmentedSupplyPass.gapFound: Supply convoy commands had multi-turn queue state, but the route still behaved too much like a delayed one-time supply pool instead of delivering support by route segment.
changes: Added commandSegmentCount so supply commands execute across 2 to 4 route segments while non-supply commands remain single-segment.
Advanced supply commands by segment during war-turn resolution, immediately increasing army supply from the remaining convoy reserve.
Kept enemy interdiction ahead of segment delivery, so intercepted convoys lose reserve before the next segment can arrive.
Extended war command summaries with segment progress and delivered/planned supply totals.
Added a focused Playwright regression covering supply command creation, one war-turn advance, first-segment delivery, and logistics record output.

stageHeartbeatRouteBlockadeObjectsPass.focus: route-network choke point blockade and guard objects
stageHeartbeatRouteBlockadeObjectsPass.gapFound: Enemy interdiction AI targeted named choke points, but choke points were metadata rather than selectable, guardable map objects.
changes: Added RouteBlockade runtime objects with linked interdiction order, choke route, network label, strength, guard strength, and status.
Enemy interdiction at a named bottleneck now creates or refreshes a blockade object.
Added route-blockade logistics map objects with distinct Three.js marker geometry and color.
Added guard and clear blockade actions; guard reduces risk and damage, clear resolves the linked interdiction and removes the active map object.
Resolved click priority conflicts by comparing projected-center distance before choosing enemy threat vs logistics object selection.
Exported routeBlockades in war logistics state and added Playwright coverage for select, guard, and clear.

remainingRisks: Route blockades are runtime/export state, not importable save state yet.

nextFocusCandidates: Dataize STRATEGIC_ROUTE_NETWORKS into route_networks.json and data contract.

stageHeartbeatWarLogisticsImportPass.focus: importable war logistics state for blockade and interdiction recovery
stageHeartbeatWarLogisticsImportPass.gapFound: War logistics export included convoys, enemy interdiction memory, route capacities, and route blockades, but refresh/replay could not restore those runtime objects for continued operation.
changes: Added StrategyUi.importWarLogisticsState for schemaVersion 1 snapshots.

Restores current war turn, selected logistics object, selected enemy interdiction, enemy interdiction memory, active enemy orders, transport convoys, occupation supply tasks, route capacities, governance logistics effects, stations, and route blockades.
Expanded exported convoy state with orderIndex, createdTurn, completedSegments, and segmentCount.
Expanded exported enemy interdiction orders with chokeReason.
Added window.__WANCHAO_APP__.importWarLogisticsState and synchronized restored state into the Three.js threat and logistics object layers.

stageHeartbeatStructuralFixPass.focus: preflight contract, shared route capacity, and war logistics import context
stageHeartbeatStructuralFixPass.gapFound: The web-strategy-map mainline was passing, but Unity preflight still required removed legacy runner scripts; route capacity was directional instead of shared by physical bottleneck; war logistics import restored runtime objects without restoring active army, target, or waypoint context.
changes: Changed tools/unity/preflight_without_unity.py so deleted Unity/Tuanjie runner and handoff scripts are legacy optional warnings rather than hard failures.
Added routeCapacityKey() and moved route capacity tracking, route-leg IDs, route preview usage, and imported route capacities onto a canonical undirected physical route key.
Exported activeArmyTargetId and activeArmyWaypointId in war logistics snapshots.
Restored active army, target region, and waypoint in StrategyUi.importWarLogisticsState().
Synchronized imported active army, target, waypoint, enemy interdiction layer, and logistics object layer into the Three.js scene.
Expanded Playwright route-alternative coverage to verify non-default army snapshot import and canonical shared route-leg IDs.

stageHeartbeatFullGameStateImportPass.focus: full game export/import schema for web strategy map
stageHeartbeatFullGameStateImportPass.gapFound: War logistics import could restore convoys and interdiction slices, but a page refresh still lost nation resources, region runtime governance, emperor choice, dynamic armies, queues, battle reports, panel chrome, mode, tab, and selected region as one coherent game state.
changes: Added StrategyUi.exportGameState() with schemaVersion 1 covering mode, selection, emperor, sidebar state, route pick mode, war tab, army order, nation state, all region runtime state, armies, governance/logistics/operation/occupation/war command/battle report queues, and war logistics state.
Added StrategyUi.importGameState() to restore the full snapshot and reuse war logistics import for convoys, interdiction, blockades, stations, route capacities, and governance logistics effects.
Restored saved mode and war tab after the war logistics slice temporarily switches the UI to war/logistics.
Synchronized sidebar collapsed DOM state during import.
Removed stale army_player_detached_* runtime armies not present in the snapshot before restoring saved dynamic armies.
Added window.__WANCHAO_APP__.exportGameState/importGameState and synchronized imported active army, target, waypoint, threats, and logistics objects into the Three.js scene.

Added Playwright coverage for emperor selection, governance changes, route alternative, split army, general/unit mix changes, logistics commands, sidebar collapse, export, reopen, import, and continued turn advance.

stageHeartbeatLocalSaveSlotsPass.focus: player-facing localStorage save slots and schema error prompts
stageHeartbeatLocalSaveSlotsPass.gapFound: Full game export/import existed only through debug API; players had no save slots across refresh, no visible schemaVersion mismatch prompt, and the UI button load path did not synchronize the Three.js scene selection after import.
changes: Added a right-sidebar local save panel with three slots and save/load/delete actions.
Stored save envelopes in localStorage under wanchao:strategy-map:save:<slot> with schemaVersion 1 and embedded full GameExportState snapshots.
Added envelope and game-state schemaVersion checks with Chinese errors for version mismatch, missing state, and invalid JSON.
Added saveSlotMessage, saveSlotError, and saveSlotCount to UI debug state.
Added UiEvents.onGameStateImported so player-facing slot loads reuse syncSceneAfterStateImport and restore scene selection, active army, target, waypoint, interdiction threats, and logistics objects.

stageHeartbeatGovernanceMicroPass.gapFound: Governance still worked like several large actions with forecasts, not like a controllable region specialization system where the player can deliberately tune food, tax, military, frontier, legitimacy, and relief priorities with visible tradeoffs.
changes: Added GovernanceFocusId and RegionViewModel.governanceFocus.
Initialized each region governance focus from its generated specialization, terrain, resources, and legitimacy memory.
Added a governance micro card with six specialization routes: granary irrigation, market tax transport, military prefecture, frontier garrison, legitimacy rites, and relief livelihood.
Implemented governanceFocusPlan() as the shared forecast/apply source for resource, contribution, integration, legitimacy, risk, and logistics deltas.
Changing focus now updates region specialization, recommended building, recommended policy, source text, governance queue, nation resources, and governance logistics effects.
Extended full game save/import to preserve specialization and governanceFocus.
Added Playwright coverage for tax focus raising money/risk/contribution, relief lowering risk and costing food, visible specialization tags, and export/import focus restoration.
